sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102339" key="tanu=n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τανῦν</orth>, better <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τὰ νῦν</orth>, <sense id="n102339.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">now</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νῦν</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
